what_was_done: SurrealDB v3 upgrade: embedded v2.3.10 (surrealkv://) → standalone v3.0.5 (ws://). Fixed bincode clog corruption. Exported 12,213 records, imported into v3. Disk 4.4GB→560MB. Updated 8 files, systemd service created. Commit e1e2694.

Clean up old surrealdb/ and surrealdb.backup/ dirs (8.8GB recoverable)
